title: Migrating from Uniface 9
text: Migrating from Uniface 9 Uniface 10 introduces significant conceptual and physical changes in the Uniface development environment and Repository. You must therefore migrate your existing sources to the new Repository. There are many issues that may arise when migrating from Uniface 9. For more information, see Special Considerations When Migrating from Uniface 9 . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
